//: harness-lab lab tsconfig (TS migration, ADR-034). Self-contained: the repo-root tsconfig only includes plugins/nxtlvl/**, so this lab gates its own bin/ tree. FINAL state (migration complete): package.json is type:module so nodenext classifies every .ts as ESM — import.meta + verbatimModuleSyntax both pass. Mirrors the repo-root compilerOptions (allowJs:false since no .js remain). tsc --noEmit + editor only; Node ignores this at runtime (native type-stripping). [History: during the mixed CJS->ESM transition this used module=preserve/moduleResolution=bundler, because typeless+nodenext mis-classifies ESM .ts as CommonJS and then forbids import.meta (TS1470).]
